source_pr.title: ddl: migrate test-infra to testify for db_change_test.go

symptoms: // Using same `tk` in different goroutines may lead to data race. | tk.MustQuery("select c4, c2 from t order by c4 asc").Check(testkit.Rows("8 N", "10 A", "11 A")) (ddl/db_change_test.go)
failure_signature: // Using same `tk` in different goroutines may lead to data race. | tk.MustQuery("select c4, c2 from t order by c4 asc").Check(testkit.Rows("8 N", "10 A", "11 A")) (ddl/db_change_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky around DDL/schema changes where schema propagation is asynchronous. This PR stabilizes it by: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: // Using same `tk` in different goroutines may lead to data race. | tk.MustQuery("select c4, c2 from t order by c4 asc").Check(testkit.Rows("8 N", "10 A", "11 A")) (ddl/db_change_test.go)
